_tuning_note: Switched from flat-% to ATR-relative thresholds (atr_mode=true).
Flat % thresholds fired too often on high-vol assets (BTC 24h=2% fired ~50%
of days) while being silent on low-vol assets (GOLD 2% = 2.7 sigma = very rare).
ATR-relative mode normalises across vol regimes: threshold = multiplier * window_ATR
At multiplier 3.5/2.5/2.5, expected total = ~0.44 alerts/asset/day across all windows.

atr_multipliers._comment: Sigma multiples above typical window move. Higher = fewer alerts.

asset_daily_atr_pct._comment: Estimated daily ATR as % of price for each tracked asset (stripped name, no xyz: prefix).

thresholds._comment: Legacy flat-% thresholds — only used when atr_mode=false.
